purpose: Step-by-step data flow for happy path, all error paths, and YAML project run path

happy_path_single.action: Parse CLI args. Load Config. Apply flag overrides. Check ucgen.yaml absent for single mode.
ProviderFactory.create(config) -> provider. Call provider.is_available(). Exit with clear message if False.
assembler.assemble(intake, sections, entities, config) -> raw_markdown string
Return UseCaseDocument with all results + timing
Write .md file to output_dir. Run on_generate hook if configured.
Print Rich summary: file path, UC ID, provider, model, duration_ms

yaml_project_run_path.action: project_runner.load_project(Path('ucgen.yaml')) -> ProjectDefinition. Fail clearly if PyYAML not installed.
Merge project.defaults into Config. Apply filter_id or filter_tag if passed.
Filter use_cases by id/tag/status=pending. Show Rich progress bar.
For each use case: asyncio.run(generator.generate(uc.goal, config, provider))
Write file. Update ucgen.yaml use_case status to 'generated'.
Run on_batch_complete hook. Print summary table.

yaml_frontmatter_in_output.note: Every generated .md file starts with YAML frontmatter block
yaml_frontmatter_in_output.why: Machine-readable for ucgen validate, ucgen status, CI tooling, and documentation site generators

error_paths.provider_unavailable: Exit before pipeline. Rich error panel with diagnostic: is Ollama running? Is API key set?
error_paths.stage_parse_failure: Log WARNING with raw output. Retry once at temp=0.1. On second failure: write raw to .ucgen_debug/. Raise GenerationError.
error_paths.entity_stage_failure: Fallback to minimal entities from intake.related_entities. Log WARNING. Continue to assemble.
error_paths.template_render_failure: Raise AssemblerError — should never happen with valid schema models.
error_paths.file_write_failure: Print generated markdown to stdout as fallback. Log ERROR.
error_paths.yaml_project_not_found: Exit with clear message: 'No ucgen.yaml found. Run ucgen init-project or specify --file.'
error_paths.yaml_dep_missing: Exit with: 'Project files require PyYAML. Run: pip install ucgen[project]'

IntakeResult.title: str — proper use case title
IntakeResult.actor: str — role, never a person name
IntakeResult.supporting_actors: list[str] — external systems or roles called by this use case
IntakeResult.system_boundary: str | None — which service/component owns this

SectionsResult.minimal_guarantee: str — what system promises even on failure (Cockburn)
SectionsResult.success_guarantee: str — what is true for all stakeholders after success
SectionsResult.state_machine: list[dict] | None — [{state, transitions}] when entity has lifecycle
SectionsResult.open_issues: list[str] | None — Cockburn open issues field

UseCaseDocument.raw_markdown: str — final assembled document including YAML frontmatter
